title: Assistant Sales Manager ( Maid Agency )
description:
Assistant Sales Manager (Maid Agency)

💼 Full-Time | 💰 Basic + Commission + Bonus

About Able Best

Able Best Maid Agency has been trusted by Singapore families since 2003. With 20+ years of experience, strong customer loyalty, and steady expansion, we’re looking for a hands-on Assistant Sales Manager who can stabilise the sales team, raise performance, and eventually step into a Branch Manager role.

What This Role Really Is (Straight Talk)

This isn’t a “sit in office and approve work” job.
You’ll lead by example, close deals yourself, coach the team, and make sure daily momentum stays strong.

If you do this well, you’ll naturally grow into a Branch Manager.

Your Key Responsibilities

1. Lead the Sales Team Daily

  • Run daily huddles (targets, priorities, follow-up checks).
  • Keep morale steady and solve problems on the spot.
  • Ensure every enquiry is handled fast and properly.

2. Coach & Develop Sales Consultants

  • Train consultants on matching, interview flow, and closing.
  • Review messages, pitches, and follow-up quality.
  • Guide new hires through structured onboarding.

3. Hands-On Closing

  • Handle your own customer cases (not just supervising).
  • Step in to close difficult or high-value customers.
  • Help maintain stable monthly placements.

4. Improve Processes

  • Work with Admin and Trainer to smooth internal workflow.
  • Suggest practical improvements for customer experience.
  • Prevent leads from slipping through the cracks.

5. Track KPIs & Maintain Discipline

  • Monitor sales numbers, follow-up rate, interview success rate.
  • Intervene early when performance dips.
  • Ensure the branch runs smoothly each day.

Who We’re Looking For

  • Experience in maid agency, customer service, or sales leadership.
  • Strong communicator who can gain respect from consultants.
  • Hands-on closer — you don’t just “manage,” you do.
  • Patient but firm — able to guide juniors and correct bad habits.
  • Independent, proactive, and able to operate with minimal supervision.
  • Comfortable using WhatsApp, basic CRM tools, and simple digital systems.
  • CEI certification is required for this role.

What You’ll Get

  • Basic Salary: $2,800 – $4,200 (depending on experience).
  • Commission from personal sales + override incentive bonuses on team performance.
  • Clear career path to Branch Manager once targets and stability are achieved.
  • 5.5 day week (Alternate week off)
  • Strong support from Admin, Trainer, and leadership.
  • A stable company culture with long-term prospects.

How to Apply

Apply directly through this portal.
(We will prioritise candidates with prior experience in sales, maid agencies, or team leadership.)

postedCompany.description:
Able Best Employment Agency was established in 2003 to provide Foreign Domestic Workers to households in Singapore. We work with several reputable and trusted training partners from Indonesia, Philippines as well as Myanmar to provide these domestic helpers to Singapore families.


Over the years, we have since developed a reputation of being a reliable and trusted maid agency to our customers.
postedCompany.name: ABLE BEST EMPLOYMENT AGENCY
